what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-14 located in the design-source channel under recent-pitches, labeling it as source design ground-truth.
observations: The record references a JPEG blob via blob://b2:8fd09e061ecc3d61376c1bf2947f5e0d
Width and height fields are both set to 0
The source field is set to design_source_material
The body text explicitly calls the entry 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-14.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite the mime type being image/jpeg
Blob reference is present but no inline image data
conventions: YAML frontmatter with ledger-style metadata fields
Channel/path/blob/mime naming pattern for asset records
Provenance field (source) and author_session for attribution
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record and may indicate missing metadata
No descriptive text, alt text, or content summary for the image
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are declared
notes: A provenance-tagged metadata stub for a design-source pitch image that currently lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What visual content or pitch does p-14 represent?
Are the zero dimensions intentional placeholders or an ingestion error?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to serve as SOURCE design ground-truth for a pitch image; the actual content is a metadata stub pointing to a blob, but it omits image dimensions and descriptive content, so it only partially fulfills that purpose.
apparent_themes: Asset cataloging in a channel-memory ledger
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a specific image as canonical design-source ground-truth material associated with recent pitches.
novelty: The explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' caption and 'design_source_material' source tag signal a deliberate provenance assertion rather than a generic asset record.
contribution: This file contributes a provenance-labeled pointer to an image blob in the design-source channel, which a fused system could use to retrieve and trace the lineage of a pitch-related design asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-14 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel, referencing a JPEG blob and labeling it as design ground-truth with zero dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To register a pitch-related image as canonical design-source ground-truth material with retrievable blob provenance.
